allow: Bash(Get-ChildItem "d:\\Files RMT\\Web and Marketing\\New Cloud web\\Remont Code\\remont-platform-complete\\remont-platform" -Depth 2)

PowerShell(cd "d:\\Files RMT\\Web and Marketing\\New Cloud web\\Remont Code\\remont-platform-complete\\remont-platform\\backend"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "dist/main" -WorkingDirectory "." -RedirectStandardOutput "startup_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "startup_err.txt" -PassThru; Start-Sleep -Seconds 8; $proc.Kill\(\) 2>$null; Get-Content startup_out.txt 2>$null; Get-Content startup_err.txt 2>$null; Remove-Item startup_out.txt, startup_err.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(cd "d:\\Files RMT\\Web and Marketing\\New Cloud web\\Remont Code\\remont-platform-complete\\remont-platform\\backend"; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "dist/main" -WorkingDirectory "." -RedirectStandardOutput "startup_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "startup_err.txt" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Start-Sleep -Seconds 10; if \(-not $proc.HasExited\) { $proc.Kill\(\) }; Get-Content startup_out.txt 2>$null; Write-Host "---STDERR---"; Get-Content startup_err.txt 2>$null; Remove-Item startup_out.txt, startup_err.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)

PowerShell(Copy-Item "d:\\Files RMT\\Web and Marketing\\New Cloud web\\Remont Code\\remont-platform-complete\\remont-platform\\backend\\prisma\\schema.prisma" "d:\\Files RMT\\Web and Marketing\\New Cloud web\\Remont Code\\remont-platform-complete\\remont-platform\\backend\\prisma\\schema.postgres.prisma.bak")

PowerShell(Copy-Item "d:\\Files RMT\\Web and Marketing\\New Cloud web\\Remont Code\\remont-platform-complete\\remont-platform\\backend\\prisma\\schema.postgres.prisma.bak" "d:\\Files RMT\\Web and Marketing\\New Cloud web\\Remont Code\\remont-platform-complete\\remont-platform\\backend\\prisma\\schema.prisma" -Force)

PowerShell(cd "d:\\Files RMT\\Web and Marketing\\New Cloud web\\Remont Code\\remont-platform-complete\\remont-platform\\backend"; Start-Process -FilePath "node" -ArgumentList "dist/main" -WorkingDirectory "." -RedirectStandardOutput "server_out.txt" -RedirectStandardError "server_err.txt" -PassThru -NoNewWindow; Write-Host "Backend started \(PID $\($_.Id\)\)")
